description: A watercolor depicting the interior courtyard or loggia of the University of Genoa. Warm golden light floods through a series of rounded arches supported by ornate Corinthian columns. A stone balustrade runs along the foreground, and the receding arcade creates a strong sense of depth. The palette is dominated by warm ochres and amber tones with patches of cooler shadow, rendered in Sargent's fluid, confident watercolor technique.
